title: CreeperRefund
description: Instead of dropping 50% of destroyed blocks, creepers will now drop 100% of them.
body:
## CreeperRefund
Are you tired of those pesky creepers blowing up your builds and leaving a large hole in Minecraft? Well, fear not my friend, because CreeperRefund is here to save the day!

With CreeperRefund, you no longer have to mourn the loss of your hard-earned blocks. When a creeper explodes, the plugin will drop all the destroyed blocks so you can easily pick them up and rebuild your structure.

I know what you're thinking: "But wait, don't I have to replace all those blocks manually? That sounds like a lot of work. And yes, you are right. CreeperRefund won't automatically replace the blocks for you. But let's face it, rebuilding is half the fun of Minecraft anyway, right?

So if you're tired of losing your progress to those sneaky creepers, give CreeperRefund a try. It's the perfect plugin for those who want to protect their builds without taking away the thrill of the game. 

## Performance
CreeperRefund is a lightweight plugin that runs smoothly without any impact on server performance, so gameplay is always enjoyable.
